title: Sasol Commits to Next Generation Catalyst Supply for e-SAF Pioneer INERATEC
content: Sasol Chemicals, a business of Sasol Ltd. and German startup INERATEC have signed a Letter of Intent (LoI) committing to the supply of Sasolâ€™s next generation catalyst as soon as the development cycle is completed in 2026. INERATEC operates the largest Power-to-Liquid (PtL) facility worldwide â€“ called ERA ONE â€“ for the production of e-Waxes and e-Fuels. The facilityâ€™s annual production target of up to 2,500 tons of sustainable e-Fuels is enabled by Sasolâ€™s current state-of-the-art Cobalt FT catalyst. The introduction of the next generation catalyst will allow the facility to exceed the current capacity and improve the e-kerosene yield by 15%.
author: Analysts Account
